scripts.backend:dev: npm run backend:db:prepare && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs development -- uv --directory backend run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host {BACKEND_HOST} --port {BACKEND_PORT}
scripts.backend:db:prepare: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs development -- uv --directory backend run python -m scripts.prepare_db
scripts.backend:db:migrate: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs development -- uv --directory backend run alembic upgrade head
scripts.backend:db:migrate:e2e: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs e2e -- uv --directory backend run alembic upgrade head
scripts.backend:seed:e2e: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs e2e -- uv --directory backend run python -m scripts.seed_e2e
scripts.backend:seed:e2e:review-navigation: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs e2e -- uv --directory backend run python -m scripts.seed_e2e --scenario review-navigation
scripts.backend:bootstrap:e2e: npm run backend:db:reset:e2e && npm run backend:db:migrate:e2e && npm run backend:seed:e2e
scripts.backend:dev:e2e: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs e2e -- uv --directory backend run uvicorn app.main:app --host {BACKEND_HOST} --port {BACKEND_PORT}
scripts.frontend:dev: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs development -- npm --workspace frontend run dev -- --mode development
scripts.frontend:dev:e2e: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs e2e -- npm --workspace frontend run dev -- --mode e2e
scripts.build: uv build --project backend && npm --workspace frontend run build
scripts.format: uv run --project backend ruff format . && npm --workspace frontend run format
scripts.format:check: uv run --project backend ruff format --check . && npm --workspace frontend run format:check
scripts.lint:fix: uv run --project backend ruff check --fix . && npm --workspace frontend run lint:fix
scripts.lint: uv run --project backend ruff check . && npm --workspace frontend run lint
scripts.typecheck: uv run --project backend pyright && npm --workspace frontend run typecheck
scripts.test:backend:coverage: uv run --project backend pytest --cov=app --cov-branch --cov-report=term-missing --cov-report=json:/tmp/video-annotator-backend-coverage.json && uv run --project backend python backend/scripts/check_coverage_gate.py /tmp/video-annotator-backend-coverage.json 90
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:backend:unit && npm run test:frontend:unit
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:backend:integration && npm run test:frontend:integration
scripts.test: npm run test:backend:coverage && npm --workspace frontend run test
